hook: Anime-style coding desk with heroic protagonist energy, built from an original character world.
positioning: morning training-room confidence, original anime protagonist silhouette, school desk meets cyber-city task board

requiredShape.marketplacePreview: 16:9 horizontal Codex-like full workspace + right-side emotional hero/world art + themed sidebar/main/composer + skin chip + Remix / Customize CTA
requiredShape.liveLayout: right 42% emotional art/world zone; left/center functional surfaces protected by pale frosted panels; composer accent ring with stable text

generationPrompts.marketplacePreview: Marketplace preview for Anime Hero Desk: horizontal 16:9 benchmark-style Codex Desktop skin preview, Codex-like desktop window occupies 52-72% left/center, visible app chrome/sidebar/main workspace/AI side panel/task cards/bottom composer, right-side emotional art zone: Right 42% shows an original anime-style heroic coder silhouette beside a desk, floating training cards, cyber city dawn outside window; no known costume/franchise pose. Category chip and Remix / Customize CTA visible. Palette canvas #F4FBFF, panelSoft #E3F1FA, panelWhite #FFFFFF, textPrimary #102033, mutedText #4D657C, accent #0EA5E9, accentAlt #F97316, glow #BDEBFF, border #C9DFEC, heroInk #102A4A. Premium PC workspace product, not a poster, not a wallpaper, not plain color. IP safety negative prompt: no recognizable anime/game character, no franchise costume, no school emblem copied from IP, no readable Japanese brand text, no watermark, no competitor image.
generationPrompts.liveBackground: Live background for Anime Hero Desk: UI-free low-detail atmospheric background only, right 42% emotional hero/world art, calm left/sidebar and bottom composer safe zones for readability scrims. Decompose into background + optional hero/ornament layer + surface/accent tokens. No baked text, no logos, no real person/team/franchise marks. Mood: morning training-room confidence, original anime protagonist silhouette, school desk meets cyber-city task board. Negative prompt: no recognizable anime/game character, no franchise costume, no school emblem copied from IP, no readable Japanese brand text, no watermark, no competitor image.

ipSafetyNotes.publicSafeVersion: Right 42% shows an original anime-style heroic coder silhouette beside a desk, floating training cards, cyber city dawn outside window; no known costume/franchise pose.
ipSafetyNotes.bannedSubjectMatter: no recognizable anime/game character, no franchise costume, no school emblem copied from IP, no readable Japanese brand text, no watermark, no competitor image
ipSafetyNotes.rightsNotes: Original programmatic vector-style composition generated locally with Playwright/CSS. No third-party artwork, real celebrities, anime/game characters, team crests, FIFA/World Cup marks, player likenesses, logos, competitor images, or external assets used.
ipSafetyNotes.builderCopyReminder: Use images you own or have rights to. Do not redistribute copyrighted celebrity, anime, sports team, or player artwork without permission.

qaNotes: Owner-review concept batch only; no real Codex Desktop apply per brief.
